title: and quotShinji just kill him already and quot
display_title: and quotShinji just kill him already and quot
wikitext:
[]: &quot;Shinji, just kill him already!&quot;             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Mar 27, 2007 9:40 pm I LOVE SPLITS DON'T YOU? --Reichu Litte off but, what was the reason behind the whole 30 some odd seconds of Shinji in his Eva holding Kaworu before he killed him? Was it just to emphasize on the whole Lilum(humans) coming about to killing Kaworu(Adam) thing? We've come so far that we've managed to destroy what we fear most kinda thing? Just want to get things straight that's all.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Mar 27, 2007 9:42 pm i "read" somewhere that it was 64 seconds of the same frame.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Mar 27, 2007 9:44 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: Litte off but, what was the reason behind the whole 30 some odd seconds of Shinji in his Eva holding Kaworu before he killed him? Was it just to emphasize on the whole Lilum(humans) coming about to killing Kaworu(Adam) thing? We've come so far that we've managed to destroy what we fear most kinda thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Tue Mar 27, 2007 9:44 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: .Litte off but, what was the reason behind the whole 30 some odd seconds of Shinji in his Eva holding Kaworu before he killed him? Was it just to emphasize on the whole Lilum(humans) coming about to killing Kaworu(Adam) thing? We've come so far that we've managed to destroy what we fear most kinda thing? Just want to get things straight that's all.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Mar 27, 2007 9:46 pm why would you cut the budget of what I believe was a wildly successful show? Because then the ending would get fucked and you'd have to retell it like 3 times to get it right and all the fans would have to buy all sorts of.... ahhhh I get it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 27, 2007 9:48 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: Litte off but, what was the reason behind the whole 30 some odd seconds of Shinji in his Eva holding Kaworu before he killed him?

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Mar 27, 2007 9:52 pm SO there was no significance in the whole Lilum killing adam thing? or whatever...?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Mar 27, 2007 9:52 pm Reichu wrote: Litte off but, what was the reason behind the whole 30 some odd seconds of Shinji in his Eva holding Kaworu before he killed him?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 27, 2007 10:10 pm slothen wrote: wtf that actually is a rational reason, although is this conjecture or was it confirmed/proved somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Mar 27, 2007 10:13 pm Is there a shot showing remaining battery life that you can time from there?

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Mar 27, 2007 10:14 pm slothen wrote: Reichu wrote: Litte off but, what was the reason behind the whole 30 some odd seconds of Shinji in his Eva holding Kaworu before he killed him?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 27, 2007 10:18 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: I pictured(also expressed in the story) it as the humans(lilum) finally destroying what they fear most, the destruction of the human race, by killing of Adam. They have finally acquired something in their possession with the same power, Eva, to prevent 3I, but still happends... I don't know... something like that. Or am I just taking this too far?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Mar 27, 2007 10:18 pm then why would i bother with a stopwatch?

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:05 pm Reichu wrote: Opteron-O3 wrote: I pictured(also expressed in the story) it as the humans(lilum) finally destroying what they fear most, the destruction of the human race, by killing of Adam. They have finally acquired something in their possession with the same power, Eva, to prevent 3I, but still happends... I don't know... something like that. Or am I just taking this too far?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:07 pm wait, wasn't Eva-01 using S^2 at this point? And Eva-02 was running off of Kaworu uberness?

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:09 pm Ornette wrote: wait, wasn't Eva-01 using S^2 at this point? And Eva-02 was running off of Kaworu uberness?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:18 pm Guys, if you haven't noticed, Anno isn't afraid of killing a minute with the same shot. Que Misato standing at the train station and Asuka and Rei in the elevator. I'd like to think there's some artistic purpose to these, but the logical reason is that they're simply there to fill time. Plus, we get to hear an extra minute of the finale of Beethoven's 9th - enjoy the music while you're waiting for Kaworu's head to go sploosh.

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:23 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Guys, if you haven't noticed, Anno isn't afraid of killing a minute with the same shot. Que Misato standing at the train station and Asuka and Rei in the elevator. I'd like to think there's some artistic purpose to these, but the logical reason is that they're simply there to fill time. Plus, we get to hear an extra minute of the finale of Beethoven's 9th - enjoy the music while you're waiting for Kaworu's head to go sploosh.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:32 pm Ornette wrote: wait, wasn't Eva-01 using S^2 at this point?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:33 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Guys, if you haven't noticed, Anno isn't afraid of killing a minute with the same shot. Que Misato standing at the train station and Asuka and Rei in the elevator. I'd like to think there's some artistic purpose to these, but the logical reason is that they're simply there to fill time. Plus, we get to hear an extra minute of the finale of Beethoven's 9th - enjoy the music while you're waiting for Kaworu's head to go sploosh.
